HGSS.601.0000:
Olivine is on the sea!\f
And if it’s on the sea, there is bound
to be something to catch!\f
I’ve fished here for 30 years.\f
Would you like to face the sea
and fish? [0200,0000]
HGSS.601.0001:
Ah, hahah!
We have ourselves a new angler!
HGSS.601.0003:
Water-type Pokémon aren’t found
in the sea alone.\r
They go wherever there is water.
HGSS.601.0004:
Whaaat? You don’t like to fish!?\r
Incomprehensible!
HGSS.601.0005:
How are things?
Land the big one?
